subtitle.en: a three-component system (leuco dye, weak acid developer, paraffin wax solvent) is coloured below the wax melt and colourless above
subtitle.ko: 3-성분(leuco·developer·왁스)이 wax 녹는점 아래선 유색, 위에선 무색 — 모든 mood ring 원리

description.en: Sigmoid colour fraction around the wax melt point. Three leuco systems (CVL blue, fluoran red, fluoran black) with different melts. Drag T to see the sharp colour switch.
description.ko: 왁스 녹는점 주위 sigmoid 색 분율. 3 시스템(CVL 청, fluoran 적, fluoran 흑)의 melt 차이. T 드래그로 색 전환.
